description_long: This vending machine features a tall, rectangular form with a modern, artistic exterior. The front is adorned with a mix of bold, horizontal black and white stripes, yellow and black caution-like bands, and a colorful, partially abstract graphic in the center. The sides are mostly black, with a protruding metallic element suggesting a functional component, possibly a handle or dispenser. The back is more subdued, dominated by black and white stripes and a visible cylindrical element near the top. The machine stands on a flat, gray base, giving it stability and a clean, urban look.
description: A tall, rectangular vending machine with bold stripes, colorful graphics, and a metallic protrusion on the side, standing on a gray base.
description_view_0: Front view shows the striped and colorful graphic face, with a clear division between black/white and yellow/black bands.
description_view_1: Side view reveals a mostly black surface with a metallic protrusion extending outward.
description_view_2: Rear view displays black and white stripes and a cylindrical component near the top, with minimal color.
description_view_3: Opposite side view is mostly black with the metallic protrusion visible, mirroring the other side.
attribute_display_panel: A rectangular display panel is visible on the front, integrated within the striped and colorful section, medium-sized and vertically oriented.
attribute_payment_interface: A metallic slot or interface is visible on the side, likely for payment, but specific types (coin, bill, card) are not clearly distinguishable.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: A set of buttons is implied on the front, possibly integrated within the striped area, but individual buttons or labels are not clearly visible.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A horizontal slot is visible on the lower front section, likely for product retrieval, with a subtle flap or door.
attribute_branding_or_signage: The front features a colorful, abstract graphic that may serve as branding, but no clear logos or text are visible.
